title: Italian Potato Dumplings
description: A traditional Italian comfort food inspired by Slovakian potato dumplings, this dish combines the fluffiness of Slovakian potato dumplings with the flavors of Italy.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the xtra flour and italian seasoning.
2. Gradually add the grated fluffy potato and mix until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
4. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
5. Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
6. Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk shape.
7. Place a spoonful of the diced potato in the center of each disk.
8. Fold the dough over the potato and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
9. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10-12 minutes or until they float to the surface.
10. Meanwhile, melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
11. Add the parmesan cheese and stir until melted and well combined.
12. Serve the cooked dumplings with the butter and parmesan sauce.
